topic: My alarm is set for three seventeen every night, and I never set it.
title: The Alarm I Never Set | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My phone alarm rang at three seventeen, and I never set it.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a phone screen glowing on a dark nightstand, dim bedroom, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep in a one bedroom flat near the river.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a darkened bedroom with a single curtained window, faint streetlight outside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I always set my alarm for seven, never earlier.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a hand setting a bedside phone, soft lamp light, dim surroundings, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That first night it woke me at the wrong hour.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a glowing phone face up on rumpled sheets in darkness, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I deleted it, certain I had made a mistake.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a thumb hovering over a dark phone screen in low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next night, same time, the same single alarm.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a bedside clock and phone both lit faintly in a black room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the history. It was added from this device.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a phone showing a list of times on a dim nightstand, lamp off, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every entry was made while I was asleep.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty bed seen from above, sheets thrown back, low moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So one night I stayed awake to watch it.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of wide open eyes reflected faintly in a dark window, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three seventeen the screen lit on its own, untouched.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a phone screen brightening alone on a nightstand in total darkness, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged everything and slept at a friend's place.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a folded blanket on a strangers couch, dim living room at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It still rings at three seventeen, wherever I sleep now.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a glowing phone on an unfamiliar nightstand in the dark, vertical 9:16 framing
